ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Mongitore, Mora Mirello became a member of the Radicati in Messina and the Oziosi in Naples. For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, p. 50 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
